race.comment: TURBO TORQUE (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-five in 11 of his past 12 starts and strikes a very winnable contest here. Has placed three of four around this circuit and gets 3kg off with the claim. Rates the testing material. Former Victorian PULSATING (8) just ran into one better when having her first run for the new stable and will have come on with that outing now under the belt. Should prove hard to hold out. AGNAR (1) hit the frame at Townsville on debut and will have taken a stack of benefit from that day at the races. Top-three credentials with natural improvement. SPORT (9) has placed two of two over this course and distance and looks a must for the multiples. PROVISEUR (2) next best in a race with only a handful of chances.
